title: Angel Hair Pasta with Fresh Tomato Sauce
ingredients: 8-10 Roma tomatoes or 4 large red tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
1 small white onion or 3 scallions, minced
instructions: Combine tomatoes, herbs, olive oil and lemon juice in a bowl.
Mix half of the sauce in with the hot cooked pasta.
Top pasta with the remaining sauce.
Top with freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
notes: This is a family favorite in the summertime when freshly harvested tomatoes are at their peak.
